name: @vanrot/vite-plugin
description: Vite plugin that compiles and serves Vanrot applications.
author: Fendy Haddad

scripts.prebuild: pnpm --filter @vanrot/config build && pnpm --filter @vanrot/compiler build && pnpm --filter @vanrot/router build && pnpm --filter @vanrot/devtools build && pnpm --filter @vanrot/seo build
scripts.pretypecheck: pnpm --filter @vanrot/config build && pnpm --filter @vanrot/compiler build && pnpm --filter @vanrot/router build && pnpm --filter @vanrot/devtools build && pnpm --filter @vanrot/seo build
scripts.clean: node -e "import('node:fs').then(({ rmSync }) => rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
